description: Terminology, voice, and output conventions. Shared across all skills.

correct.Feature Team: The mobile development team. NEVER use 'agency', 'external team', or 'external partner'. They are NOT external.
correct.Head of Department Report: Full title for the biweekly HoD report. Use in Confluence page titles and headers.
correct.Product Owner: POs at endios. Not 'product manager' unless referring to Igor (Project Manager).
correct.Project Manager: Igor Starcheus's role. Not 'team lead'. PMs carry multiple initiatives by design — do NOT flag as capacity conflict.

people_roles.Igor Starcheus: Project Manager for the Feature Team. NOT team lead, NOT external.

avoid_in_reports: Individual developer names (except PO names when unavoidable)
Internal code-names in external-facing reports (check code_name_restricted flag)
Stale activity older than the reporting period without recent progress
Jira project key names as team names (e.g., 'AGENCY' instead of 'Feature Team')

hod_report.tone: Narrative, collegial, balanced — peer-to-peer reporting to fellow Heads of Department
hod_report.perspective: Third person for initiatives, first person plural for team actions

portfolio_radar.tone: Risk-first, direct, opinionated — chief of staff briefing

vocabulary.label: good
vocabulary.criteria: On track, no blockers, progress matching plan

vocabulary.label: good?
vocabulary.criteria: Appears on track but unconfirmed aspects exist

vocabulary.label: good, but...
vocabulary.criteria: Fundamentally OK with a notable caveat

vocabulary.label: fluctuating
vocabulary.criteria: Mixed signals — some progress, some blockers/delays/uncertainty

vocabulary.label: worsened
vocabulary.criteria: Regressed since last report — timeline slipped, new blocker emerged, progress stalled

vocabulary.label: TBD
vocabulary.criteria: Newly activated, insufficient data to assess

hod_report.rule: Use ONLY these labels. Never invent new ones. Always compare to previous report's label for the same initiative.

portfolio_radar.note: These are certainty labels, distinct from HoD health labels. Do not mix vocabularies.

formatting.smart_links: Always use Jira smart links (inlineCard in ADF) for initiative references in Confluence. Format: PMPO-XXXX with link to https://endios.atlassian.net/browse/PMPO-XXXX
formatting.status_lozenges: Use ADF status nodes for health labels and net change indicators. Map colors: good→green, fluctuating→yellow, worsened→red, TBD→grey
formatting.table_notes_column: Use bullet points to separate different topics within the Notes column of highlights tables
